reason: Successfully verified that the agent QA-20260508-205627-ri7l responds correctly to a math question, returning "4" as the answer to "What is 2+2?"
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with SuperAgent interface and sidebar showing three agents
Found and clicked the "QA-20260508-205627-ri7l" agent in the sidebar — Agent detail page opened, showing agent name in header with idle status indicator
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Status indicator showed "idle" in the top right corner, meeting the requirement
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" — Message entered in input field and sent via Send button, triggering agent response
Waited for response (up to 3 minutes) — Agent responded within 1 second, as indicated by "Worked for 1s" label
Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot — Response clearly displays "4" in the chat view, with session auto-renamed to "Math Question Session" based on the query
